summary: Classified the listed PR inventory shard independently using the preflight artifact. No merge or fix actions are allowed by the job. The coverage-only PR is kept independent because the planned closeout lacked a hydrated canonical, duplicate, or candidate-fix target required for safe closure. One security-sensitive linked ref is routed to central security handling, and one PR has an unresolved technical-correctness decision for maintainers.

actions.reason: Coverage-only branch may overlap current main, but the provided structured artifacts do not support a validator-safe close target, so this shard should leave the PR open for normal maintainer review instead of planning a mutating close.
Independent maintainer-owned fix candidate with proof supplied; keep for normal maintainer review rather than close or merge in this shard.
Independent focused compatibility fix; keep open for maintainer review.
Large independent feature PR with unresolved review/CI context; not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate.
Independent maintainer follow-up with review issues still open; keep for author/maintainer workflow.
Focused independent CI improvement with proof; keep for maintainer review.
Independent draft maintainer PR; keep open for the author and normal review path.
Maintainer technical-correctness judgment is needed on whether the search-miss heuristic is too broad before any close, merge, or fixed-by classification.
Related candidate for an open issue, but proof failure blocks merge or fixed-by closeout; keep open without treating it as a duplicate.
Independent maintainer draft with requested changes; keep for author follow-up.
Exact linked ref is security-sensitive and must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling without ProjectClownfish mutation.

needs_human: #89693 requires maintainer technical-correctness judgment on whether the optional scanner search-miss heuristic can incorrectly suppress required final search failures.
